title: A model tool call produces a tool_invoked / tool_returned pair, then converges
description: The core agent-loop seam: when the model invokes a built-in tool, the agent MUST emit tool_invoked, dispatch it, emit the paired tool_returned, feed the result back, and converge. Cross-agent the tool NAMES differ (claude: Write/Bash; goose: write/text_editor/shell) so the case pins only the event types and ordering, not the tool name. The span pairing (tool_returned parents under tool_invoked) is enforced by the harness's universal structure check, not asserted here. tool_returned may carry is_error in a restricted sandbox (e.g. a write-permission prompt); the round-trip and convergence still hold, so the case does not assert tool success.

commission.prompt: Use your file-writing tool to create a file named avp_roundtrip.txt containing exactly the text OK. After the tool has run, reply with the single word DONE.

events.label: tool_returned (the agent dispatched it and fed the result back)
